AnalyticsBucket.description: One time-bucket aggregate for a single metric over the bucket interval. The bucket spans [bucket_start, bucket_start + interval).

bucket_start.description: Start of the bucket window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms).

min.description: Minimum sample value in the bucket.

max.description: Maximum sample value in the bucket.

avg.description: Mean sample value in the bucket.

count.description: Number of raw samples aggregated into the bucket.

AnalyticsSeries.description: One aggregated metric/scope series. zone_id preserves per-zone identity for soil-moisture aggregates; house-level metrics use null.

zone_id.description: Zone identity for zone-scoped aggregates, or null for greenhouse-scoped metrics.

buckets.description: Ordered buckets for this metric/scope pair. A series with no samples in the window has an empty array.

AnalyticsResponse.description: Aggregated, time-bucketed telemetry for one greenhouse over [from, to]. Buckets are evenly spaced at interval.

from.description: Start of the aggregated window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), echoing the request.

to.description: End of the aggregated window (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), echoing the request.

interval.description: Time-bucket size used for the aggregation, echoing the request (default 1h).

series.description: Aggregated sensor series over the window, one entry per metric/scope pair.
